resources.name: Synapse-RS API
resources.description: Synapse-RS HTTP endpoints — maintained in dev-tools/, updated as endpoints land (same rule as the oracle repo: never let it drift).

resources.name: GET /api/health
resources.description: Liveness check — 200 with {"status": "ok (walking skeleton)"} while the server is up. (step 01)

resources.name: GET /api/synapse/index
resources.description: The browsable library index — kind-discriminated category/book tree. Carries the content cache header. (step 06)

resources.name: GET /api/synapse/{paths…}
resources.description: A lesson payload by its directory-mirror path (category…/book/chapter…/lesson) — raw markdown + frontmatter + full prev/next. (step 06)

resources.name: execution
resources.description: Rate limited (step 18): anonymous 10/60s per IP, signed-in 100/3600s per sub; over the window = 429 + retry seconds in the ApiError detail (no Retry-After header).

resources.name: POST /api/run
resources.description: Run one snippet in the go-judge sandbox. A badly-running program is a 200 with a non-Accepted status; 422 unknown language, 413 over the byte caps, 503/502 backend. (step 10)

resources.name: GET /api/synapse/c4-doc/{elementId}?lesson=
resources.description: A LikeC4 component's tutorial doc — the co-located _c4-docs/<leaf>.md sidecar next to the lesson. (step 06)

resources.name: submissions
resources.description: POST shares the step-18 rate-limit gate (429 + 'Sign in for a bigger submission budget.').

resources.name: POST /api/submissions
resources.description:
Submit a solution — 202 + id; the suite judges in the background (step 14). 404 not-a-problem, 500 invalid suite.

Allowlist (step 20): with SUBMISSION_ALLOWLIST_ENFORCED=true (prod), anonymous → 401 'Sign in to submit', unlisted username → 403 'Submitting is allow-listed on this deployment'. Dev default = open.

resources.name: GET /api/submissions/{id}
resources.description: Poll one submission until status == completed (step 14).

resources.name: GET /api/submissions?path=
resources.description: Submissions for a lesson, newest first (identity later scopes it to the caller).

resources.name: GET /api/auth/config
resources.description: The SPA's Keycloak coordinates, split from the issuer (step 16).

resources.name: GET /api/me
resources.description: Who am I — requires a bearer; 401 missing/invalid, 503 verifier down (step 16).

resources.name: DELETE /api/submissions/{id}
resources.description: Owner-only delete — 401 anonymous, 403 someone else's (step 16).

resources.name: DELETE /api/submissions
resources.description: Erase every submission of the caller — reset my data (step 16).

resources.name: blog
resources.description: The flat, chronological blog: markdown posts at synapse-content/blog/<slug>.md (drafts are _-prefixed and never ship). Same markdown pipeline as lessons, no workbenches.

resources.name: GET /api/blog
resources.description: The listing: [{slug, title, summary, publishedAt, tags, readMinutes, eyebrow}], newest first (undated last). Public content read — carries the edge cache header.

resources.name: GET /api/blog/{slug}
resources.description: One post: frontmatter + markdown body + prev/next slugs (publish order; prev = older, next = newer, null at the ends).

resources.name: GET /api/blog/{unknown}
resources.description: An unknown slug is a 404 + ApiError.

resources.name: DELETE /api/me
resources.description: Delete the caller's sign-in via the SCOPED synapse-admin service-account client (client_credentials, realm-management:manage-users only — never the master admin). Bearer required. App data is the separate DELETE /api/submissions verb; the account page orchestrates erase → delete → sign-out. Keycloak-admin-down → 503, never a swallowed success.

resources.name: admin
resources.description: The allowlist panel's API (step 21). Admin-gated per call: ADMIN_USERS config (dev default 'tester'), compared lowercase against the verifier's canonical username. MeDto.admin is UX only.

resources.name: GET /api/admin/allowlist
resources.description: Every grant, newest first. Anonymous → 401; verified non-admin → 403 'Admin only'.

resources.name: POST /api/admin/allowlist
resources.description: Grant (upsert): username trimmed + lowercased server-side; blank → 400; returns the stored row.

resources.name: DELETE /api/admin/allowlist/{username}
resources.description: Revoke → 204; unknown grant → 404.

resources.name: tutoring
resources.description: The local Socratic coach (step 22, ADR-S025). OFF by default; when off, chat is a STRUCTURAL 404 (the route is never mounted). Enable locally: TUTOR_ENABLED=true (+ TUTOR_URL/TUTOR_MODEL; Ollama default http://localhost:11434, llama3.1).

resources.name: GET /api/tutor/config
resources.description: Always answers: {enabled, model} — 200 even when the coach is off.

resources.name: POST /api/tutor/chat
resources.description: One coaching turn: the FULL transcript up, one reply back. Backend down → 503 + TUTOR_URL hint; backend error → 502. 404 while disabled.

resources.name: GET /media/{path} (lesson media, cache 1h, range-aware)
resources.description: Serves content_root/_media; public,max-age=3600 on 200 AND 206; single bytes= range honoured.
